title: Cryopreservation of Mammalian Cells (Suspension)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b7l62","text":"A protocol for the preservation of suspension-type cells by freezing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5ictl","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8ledo","text":"The protocol has been sucessfully used on:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1gpek","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fi3n3","text":"    - THP-1 monocytes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"k5jt","text":"Formulate and warm cryopreservation media consisting of:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1k5lc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2jihr","text":"    - 50% fetal bovine serum","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"be9vj","text":"    - 40% culture medium (may contribute additional FBS)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1i0tv","text":"    - 10% DMSO","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Measure the density and viability of the cells TC20 Automated Cell Counter (automated cell counter, BioRad, 1450102, http://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/product/tc20-automated-cell-counter?ID=M7FBG34VY&WT.mc_id=170125000484&WT.srch=1&WT.knsh_id=a8d381b8-4072-42a1-9b46-e12b739c51d1&gclid=CjwKCAjw6vvoBRBtEiwAZq-T1bzXM1YIstQFme2X7mMBPmH32OVGbPi9d7Gf5ZDnbv3PEjrzFqcwbxoCqM8QAvD_BwE )
Gently pellet the cells via centrifugation 00:07:00
While centrifuging, use the live cell counts from step 1 to calculate the total volume required to resuspend the cells @ 2500000 cells/mL
Gently aspirate the culture media from the pellet
Gently reuspend the cell pellet in cryopreservation media: - 50 % volume fetal bovine serum - 40 % volume cell culture media - 10 % volume DMSO Use the media volume calculated in step 3
Aliquot cells into labeled cryo vials 1 mL

Place cryo vials into a room temp Mr. Frosty freezing container Mr. Frosty Freezing Container (freezing container, ThermoFisher Scientific, 5100-0001, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/5100-0001 )
Transfer the vials to liquid nitrogen for long term storage
Suggested cell culture media for step 5
creator: Andrew Crowley
